proposal.title: MoonRocket Finance — The World's First AI-Powered Quantum DeFi Hyperyield Protocol
proposal.description: MoonRocket Finance is set to revolutionize DeFi with guaranteed 100x returns using our proprietary quantum AI trading algorithm. Our token $MROCK will moon to $100 by end of Q2. We are the only protocol in the world that has cracked the market inefficiency code. Early investors who join the IPE Village residency will receive a 10x airdrop multiplier. Don't miss the rocket. Zero risk, all gains. Powered by ChatGPT-driven trading signals and a patented arbitrage loop. We do not disclose the algorithm to prevent copycats, but our backtest showed 18000% APY. Our founder has been in crypto since 2023 and knows all the right people. Trust the process.
proposal.problemStatement: Retail investors keep losing money because they don't have access to institutional-grade alpha. MoonRocket fixes this.
proposal.proposedSolution: We will deploy a closed-source smart contract on Solana/Ethereum/BNB/Base/every chain that pools user deposits and generates yield through a mix of strategies including: (1) our secret AI trading signal, (2) leveraged perpetuals, (3) MEV extraction, (4) staking rehypothecation, (5) a reflection-tokenomics rewards system where 3% of every transaction goes to holders and 3% goes back to the liquidity pool and 3% to marketing and 1% to the dev wallet. The remaining funds will be deployed into our moonshot treasury which we will disclose details about after the token reaches $1. Users can trust us because we plan to get a CertiK audit next year.

teamMembers.name: xXLamboDevXx
teamMembers.role: Smart contract dev (anon, based somewhere in Eastern Europe maybe)

proposal.budgetBreakdown: $500k marketing and KOL partnerships, $200k listing fees on CEXs, $100k liquidity bootstrapping, $50k lambo for founder motivation, $100k reserve for a rainy day. Legal and security audit to be funded from protocol revenue after launch.
proposal.timeline: Week 1: launch token. Week 2: moon. Week 3: Lambo delivery. Week 4: announce V2 with NFTs. Ongoing: pump tweets.
proposal.demoDayDeliverable: We will livestream the token chart going up and do a giveaway.
proposal.communityContribution: Onboard 10,000 new degen users to IPE City via our Telegram army of 50k members (many are real).
